The '''Maelstrom Nebula''' was a [[nebula]] located in [[the galaxy]].<ref name="Smuggler's Guide">''[[Star Wars: Smuggler's Guide]]''</ref> It was classified as a [[Type 15A stellological phenomenon]].<ref name="Outlaws" /> During the [[Imperial Era|Age of the Empire]], the [[pirate]] [[Gunda Mabin]] operated from a location in the nebula.<ref name="Smuggler's Guide" />

{{Neb-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Maelstrom Nebula was first mentioned in the [[2018]] reference book ''[[Star Wars: Smuggler's Guide]]'' by [[Daniel Wallace]]<ref name="Smuggler's Guide" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'' {{Mo}} {{DLC|''A Pirate's Fortune''}}
